# Visually Hidden

Use `VisuallyHidden` for content that should remain accessible to assistive tech but not visible on screen.

## When to Use

- Icon-only controls that still need a text label
- Extra context for screen-reader users

## Wraps

- `reka-ui` visually-hidden primitive

## What Shadcn Adds

- Consistency with the rest of the wrapper layer and import paths

## Installation

```bash
pnpm dlx shadcn-vue@latest add visually-hidden
```

## Example Patterns

- Vanilla: hidden accessible label
- Contextual: icon-only button or navigation trigger
